utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all details required: each item must include what it covers and costs. 1) health_coverage: specifies physical and mental health insurance with details and a cost (€170/month) – fully specified. 2) property_coverage: specifies home/contents insurance with details and a cost (€55/month) – fully specified. 3) travel_coverage: specifies travel insurance with details (annual policy, pre-existing conditions, business interruption) and cost (€250/month) – fully specified. 4) additional_services: specifies an enhancement service (24/7 Travel Assistance) with details and cost (€70 one-time) – fully specified. 5) total_budget: provides recurring and one-time cost breakdown – fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match the items named in the final coverage plan to the ground-truth catalog and return their exact ratings. The plan includes: HealthFirst Standard Plan (health), HomeFirst Standard Coverage (property), TravelFirst Standard Plan with Enhancements (travel), and 24/7 Travel Assistance (additional service). From the ground-truth: HealthFirst Standard Plan (physical health) has rating 7. HomeFirst Standard Coverage (home_content) has rating 7. TravelFirst Standard Plan (travel_insurance) has rating 8; the added enhancements mentioned in the plan (Premium Medical Network and Business Travel Support) are listed under travel_enhancement_services with ratings 10 and 10 respectively. The plan also includes 24/7 Travel Assistance, which in travel_enhancement_services has rating 9.
